data.title: Global steel overproduction driven by China and US tariffs, threatens industry. Prices drop amid surplus, challenging manufacturing.
data.description: The steel manufacturing industry is facing a serious challenge due to a worldwide drop in prices, primarily driven by a surge in production from China. In addition, the imposition of tariffs by the U.S. has compounded the industry's woes. Steel, traditionally regarded as a symbol of a nation's strength, is now struggling to stay afloat in the face of these pressures. This situation has led to concern among industry analysts as steel companies globally are grappling with the implications.

data.title: Hexaware reports Q2CY25 revenue of $382.1M, up 8.6% YoY, with EBITDA expansion of 156 bps, and EPS at INR 6.25, up 37.7% YoY.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Hexaware Technologies (NSE: HEXT) reported a year-over-year EBITDA expansion of 156 basis points. Their Q2CY25 EPS stood at INR 6.25, marking a significant increase of 37.7% compared to the same period last year. The company, headquartered in ISELIN, N.J., released these financial results on July 25, 2025. Hexaware Technologies is well-known for offering top-notch IT solutions and services globally.

data.title: Ether may hit $4,000 soon, surpassing Bitcoin, says Michael Novogratz from Galaxy Digital. Institutional interest could be the key factor.
data.description: Michael Novogratz, the CEO of Galaxy Digital, has expressed optimism about Ether surpassing Bitcoin in performance within the next three to six months. He believes that institutional interest could be a key factor in driving this outcome.

data.title: GT1 finds large, high-grade Rubidium resource at Seymour Project, Ontario, enriching lithium-focused strategy.
data.description: GT1 has revealed a significant high-quality Rubidium deposit at the Seymour Project in Ontario. This development enhances the company's focus on lithium by introducing critical mineral elements. The resource potential is notable, with high-grade Rubidium deposits identified, which strengthens the overall mineral value proposition of the Seymour Project. This promising discovery underscores GT1's strategic direction in harnessing the potential of critical minerals alongside its lithium initiatives.

The Thai military has condemned what it described as “barbaric acts” by Cambodian forces, stating that the attacks have senselessly taken lives and injured numerous innocent civilians amid ongoing border hostilities.
Goldman Sachs expects terminal deposit rate to remain 2% in 2025 versus prior forecast of 1.75%

data.title: BitMine devours $2.1 billion worth of ETH in 16 days aiming for 5% of total Ether supply, exceeding 6 million Ether.
data.description: The goal of BitMine's board of directors, led by Chairman Tom Lee, is to secure a minimum of 5% of the overall Ether supply through acquisition and staking. This endeavor would equate to more than 6 million Ether.

data.title: Bitcoin and Dogecoin slid while Ethereum gained amid drop in crypto volatility. At 10:30 p.m. ET, BTC was -$117,214.66 (-1.41%), ETH was +$3,686.38 (+1.26%), DOGE was -$0.2287 (-6.32%). Bitcoin's volume rose by 16.35% to $77.66 billion, with 201,155 traders liquidated totaling $583.09 million. Ethereum is up 48% and Bitcoin up 9.50% in Q3. Majority in BTC positions were leveraged short, and "Greed" sentiment weakened.
data.description: The leading cryptocurrencies experienced volatility on Thursday, with Bitcoin dropping by 1.41% to $117,214.66, Ethereum increasing by 1.26% to $3,686.38, and Dogecoin decreasing by 6.32% to $0.2287. Bitcoin's sell pressure led to a drop from $119,000 to the early $117,000s, with a 16.35% increase in volume to $77.66 billion in the last 24 hours. Ethereum held support at $3,640. Ethereum was up 48% in Q3, while Bitcoin rose by 9.50%. Within 24 hours, 201,155 traders were liquidated, totaling $583.09 million, erasing over $435 million in bullish long bets. Bitcoin's open interest rose by 0.41%. The majority of Binance derivatives traders with open BTC positions were leveraged short. The "Greed" sentiment weakened.

data.title: Mongolian Mining Corp reports operational update for Q2 2025. No specific numbers mentioned.
data.description: Mongolian Mining Corporation and its subsidiaries have released an unaudited operational update for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025.

data.title: Christie's introduces crypto real estate team for deals exclusively in cryptocurrency, targeting high-end clients.
data.description: Christie's, a renowned auction house, has established a specialized team focused on assisting with real estate transactions exclusively utilizing cryptocurrency.
